title: The Crew Studies Alabasta
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on the crew studies alabasta, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Crew Studies Alabasta. After leaving Drum, the crew heads deeper into Alabasta’s conflict while the desert kingdom’s danger comes into view. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes, there's a hot spot here.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's what we call a place that spews magma. Underneath here is an underwater volcano.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Yes. In fact, there are more volcanoes underwater than there are on land.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Who cares, it's not like we can eat it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In some thousands or ten thousands of years from now,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The underwater volcano here will give birth to a new island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is an amazing place, isn't it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In some ten thousands of years, huh... Wonder if I'll be alive then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Not a chance. That is, if you're human.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I can't see anything with all this steam!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Bear with it, we'll sail past it soon enough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Pay no heed! sail straaa- aanight through it!

summary: This part highlights the crew studies alabasta and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
